Title: Confirm Level 1 FCI scope
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Andy Volk; Sulaiman Ahmad
Description: Define the in-scope FCI environment including systems, users, devices, networks, and physical locations.
Definition of Done: Approved scope statement exists and is referenced by Level 1 work.

Title: Complete Level 1 owner matrix
Supporting Owners: Ryan Lin; Joshua Hornback; Sulaiman Ahmad
Description: Assign primary and supporting owners for each Level 1 artifact and control family.
Definition of Done: Owner matrix is approved and every Level 1 artifact has a named owner.

Title: Build Level 1 evidence index
Description: Map each of the 17 Level 1 practices to artifacts, proof sources, owners, and review dates.
Definition of Done: Every Level 1 practice is mapped to current evidence or a tracked gap.

Title: Run Level 1 gap assessment
Description: Assess all 17 Level 1 practices against the current artifact and operating evidence set.
Definition of Done: All Level 1 gaps are recorded with owners, severity, and target dates.

Title: Finalize Level 1 access control policy
Description: Replace template language with environment-specific access control policy content.
Definition of Done: Approved access control policy reflects the live environment.

Title: Validate authorized users and devices
Description: Confirm authorized user and device lists are current and enforceable for in-scope systems.
Definition of Done: Authorized user/device records are current and linked in the evidence index.

Title: Validate external access and public posting controls
Dependencies: AC external access templates; VPN details
Description: Confirm external system access, VPN configuration, and public posting restrictions are documented and enforced.
Definition of Done: External access controls are documented, validated, and evidenced.

Title: Finalize identification and authentication artifacts
Description: Finalize identification, authentication, and password procedure documents for the live environment.
Definition of Done: IA documents are current and approved.

Title: Validate account inventory and authentication controls
Dependencies: IA documents; directory and account data
Description: Confirm unique identities, account inventory, authentication settings, and password controls are operating.
Definition of Done: Account inventory and authentication evidence are current and mapped to practices.

Title: Finalize media disposal and reuse procedures
Dependencies: MP policy and reuse procedure templates
Description: Tailor media disposal and reuse procedures to the actual environment and handling process.
Definition of Done: Media handling documents are approved and operationally accurate.

Title: Validate media disposal logs and sanitization
Description: Confirm disposal and reuse records exist and media containing FCI is sanitized or destroyed correctly.
Definition of Done: Current disposal and sanitization evidence exists for the in-scope environment.

Title: Finalize physical access policy and records
Description: Finalize physical access policy, visitor procedures, badge records, and access list structure.
Definition of Done: Physical access documentation is approved and aligned to actual site operations.

Title: Validate physical access logs and visitor controls
Description: Confirm visitor escorting, badge control, and access log retention are operating in practice.
Definition of Done: Current physical access evidence is collected and linked to Level 1 practices.

Title: Finalize network monitoring and segmentation artifacts
Description: Finalize network monitoring policy, segmentation policy, and network diagrams.
Definition of Done: Network protection artifacts reflect the current environment.

Title: Validate firewall and boundary protections
Dependencies: SC documents; network and firewall access
Description: Confirm boundary protections, monitoring, and segmentation are operating for in-scope systems.
Definition of Done: Boundary control evidence is current and mapped to Level 1 practices.

Title: Finalize patch and malware management artifacts
Description: Finalize patch management, antivirus management, update policy, and scanning artifact set.
Definition of Done: System integrity documents are accurate and approved.

Title: Validate scanning
Description: SI documents; scan tools; update records
Definition of Done: L1;SI;Implementation;Evidence
column13: Confirm patching, scanning, malicious code protection, and update cadence are operating in practice.
column14: Operational SI evidence is current and linked to Level 1 practices.

Title: Prepare Level 1 readiness package
Description: Assemble the Level 1 attestation-ready evidence pack and summary for review.
Definition of Done: Leadership can review a concise Level 1 readiness package with residual risks.

Title: Confirm Level 2 CUI boundary
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Andy Volk; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: SSP template; handbook; current system inventory
Description: Define the in-scope CUI environment including systems, services, users, locations, and data flows.
Definition of Done: Approved CUI boundary exists and is reflected in the SSP.

Supporting Owners: Ryan Lin; Andy Volk; Sulaiman Ahmad
Description: Rewrite the SSP to reflect the real environment, architecture, owners, trust zones, and data flows.
Definition of Done: SSP is environment-specific, current, and approved for readiness work.

Title: Create Level 2 gap register
Description: Maintain the structural gap list for Level 2 readiness and track which working files close which gaps.
Definition of Done: All structural Level 2 gaps are listed, owned, and mapped to closure work.

Title: Create missing Level 2 domain artifacts for SI

Title: Create missing Incident Response policy

Title: Build Level 2 evidence index
Description: Map all in-scope Level 2 practices to artifacts, proof sources, owners, and review dates.
Definition of Done: Every in-scope Level 2 practice has an evidence path or a tracked gap.

Title: Create Level 2 POA&M tracker
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Ryan Lin; Sulaiman Ahmad
Description: Track deficiencies, remediation actions, owners, due dates, and closure evidence for Level 2.
Definition of Done: All material deficiencies are tracked with owners and closure paths.

Title: Validate identity and privilege controls
Description: Validate MFA, unique identity, account lifecycle, least privilege, and privileged access restrictions.
Definition of Done: Current identity and privilege evidence exists and is mapped to Level 2 practices.

Title: Validate logging and audit review controls
Description: Validate centralized logging, audit review cadence, retention, and alerting.
Definition of Done: Audit evidence and recurring review records are current and traceable.

Title: Validate secure configuration and change controls
Description: Validate baselines, change approvals, emergency changes, and security impact review.
Definition of Done: Configuration and change-control evidence is current and mapped to practices.

Title: Validate incident response readiness
Description: Validate incident reporting, escalation, evidence handling, and lessons-learned workflow.
Definition of Done: Incident response evidence and test outputs are current and reproducible.

Title: Validate vulnerability
Description: SI artifacts; tooling outputs
Definition of Done: L2;SI;Implementation;Evidence
column13: Validate flaw remediation, vulnerability scanning, malicious code protection, and update cadence.
column14: Operational SI evidence is current and mapped to Level 2 practices.

Title: Validate media and physical protection controls
Dependencies: MP/PE artifacts; facilities and media process
Description: Validate media handling, disposal, visitor handling, site access, and alternate work-site controls.
Definition of Done: Media and physical protection evidence is current and mapped to practices.

Title: Validate communications protection and encryption controls
Description: Validate protected communications, encryption expectations, segmentation, and remote administration paths.
Definition of Done: SC evidence is current and mapped to Level 2 practices.

Title: Run Level 2 mock assessment prep
Supporting Owners: Joshua Hornback; Sulaiman Ahmad; Ryan Lin
Description: Prepare the repository, owners, logistics, and evidence flow for an internal Level 2 mock assessment.
Definition of Done: Mock assessment checklist is complete and blockers are identified.

Title: Run internal Level 2 mock assessment
Supporting Owners: Andy Volk; Ryan Lin; Sulaiman Ahmad
Dependencies: Mock assessment checklist; SSP; evidence index; POA&M
Description: Execute an internal mock assessment against the current Level 2 package and record findings.
Definition of Done: Mock assessment is completed and findings are entered into the POA&M.

Title: Prepare executive readiness summary
Dependencies: Gap register; evidence index; POA&M; mock assessment results
Description: Summarize scope, readiness status, major gaps, and residual risk for leadership review.
Definition of Done: Leadership receives an accurate readiness summary with approval decisions and next steps.
